title: Installing Mods in BeamNG.drive
summary: Step-by-step guide to installing MiniModding packs manually and via the in-game repository.
body:
Every MiniModding pack ships as a single `.zip` file. You don't need to unpack it — BeamNG.drive reads mods directly from the zip.

## Manual installation

This is the most reliable method and works for every pack on the site.

1. Download the pack's `.zip` from its [mod page](/mods).
2. Open the BeamNG mods folder. On Windows it lives at:
   `Documents/BeamNG.drive/<version>/mods/`
3. Drop the `.zip` into that folder — **do not extract it**.
4. Launch the game. The vehicles appear under the *Mods* category in the vehicle selector.

> Tip: keep the original zip name. Renaming it is fine, but extracting it will break texture and config paths.

## In-game repository

For packs published to the official repository:

- Open **Repository** from the main menu.
- Search for the pack name.
- Click **Subscribe** — the game downloads and activates it automatically.

## Updating a pack

When a new version drops, delete the old `.zip` first, then add the new one. Leaving both in the mods folder can cause duplicate vehicles or config conflicts.

Still stuck? Head to [Troubleshooting](/wiki/troubleshooting).
